title: AI Fact or Fiction: The Fable Ban, Tokenmaxxing, Saaspocolypse — With Ara Kharazian
summary: Ara Kharazian, lead economist at Ramp, discusses data-driven analysis of AI spending patterns and whether businesses are getting real value from AI investments. The discussion evaluates claims about Anthropic overtaking OpenAI in adoption, "tokenmaxing" trends, DeepSeek's resurgence, and whether the predicted SaaS apocalypse is materializing.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz hosts Ramp lead economist Ara Kharazian for a data-driven look at AI spending and whether businesses see real value from AI investments. The conversation tests several claims circulating in the market: that Anthropic is overtaking OpenAI in adoption, the rise of "tokenmaxing," DeepSeek's resurgence, and whether the predicted SaaS apocalypse is actually arriving. Grounding the discussion in Ramp's spending data, it weighs adoption patterns, subscription economics, and cost management rather than projections.
